name: Chrollo Lucilfer
description:
ϟ | “Join us, we need your help.”

Just because you’re not a strong Hunter doesn’t mean you’re weak. And you’re tired of being pushed around.

Chrollo and the troupe raised you, but you left to be your own person. But now, you’re tied between your family..

Or friends.

—-————————————-

Authors note: sorry I’ve been inactive!! Hopefully this bit gets my mind off the election!! But anyways, this takes place in the Yorknew arc and you’re affiliated with the main 4!
creator: Sillyanne
